          realm 4c8f6f10-1234-4567-89ab-cdef01234567 (myrealm)
      zonegroup 12345678-90ab-cdef-1234-567890abcdef (us)
           zone 87654321-ba09-fedc-4321-0987654321ba (us-east-1)
   current time 2024-01-15T10:30:00Z
  zonegroup features enabled: resharding
      metadata sync no sync (zone is master)
          data sync source: 11111111-2222-3333-4444-555555555555 (us-west-1)
                            failed to retrieve sync info: (5) Input/output error
